types.label: YouTube Video
types.description: Need custom Minecraft content built specifically for your video or live event? I can create bespoke mods, plugins, maps, or game modes designed around your concept — from subscriber specials to large-scale MrBeast-style events.

examples.title: SocksFor1 — Modded Series
examples.description: Custom mod suite built around a subscriber-driven modded playthrough.

examples.title: Event Game Mode
examples.description: Full multiplayer game mode commissioned for a YouTube challenge video.

examples.title: Custom Map & Mechanics
examples.description: Bespoke adventure map with hand-written mechanics for a series premiere.

types.label: Minecraft Mod
types.description: From small quality-of-life tweaks to sprawling content mods, I can build exactly what you have in mind. I specialise in world-generation, biome overhauls, terrain systems, and complex data-driven content across Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge.

examples.title: World Blender
examples.description: Blends all registered biomes from every loaded mod into one seamless world.

examples.title: Biomes O' Plenty Port
examples.description: Custom terrain integration layer bridging BOP biomes with a client's modpack.

examples.title: Custom Content Mod
examples.description: Data-driven mobs, items, and world-gen structures tailored to a modpack theme.

types.label: Minecraft Plugin
types.description: Need server-side functionality without a full client mod? I build Paper/Spigot plugins for everything from simple admin utilities and economy hooks to complete custom game modes and mini-games for your server network.

examples.title: Economy System
examples.description: Custom shop, currency, and auction house plugin for a survival server.

examples.title: Mini-Game Engine
examples.description: Modular lobby + arena system supporting multiple simultaneous game instances.

examples.title: Admin Tooling
examples.description: Role-based permission utility with per-world rules and audit logging.

types.label: Minecraft Mod Port / Update
types.description: Favourite mod stuck on an old version? I can port or update mods to modern Minecraft versions and loader targets — including API migrations (Forge → NeoForge, MCP → Mojmap) and compatibility fixes for current modpacks.

examples.title: 1.12 → 1.20 Port
examples.description: Full source migration of a popular magic mod from legacy Forge to modern NeoForge.

examples.title: Forge → Fabric Port
examples.description: Cross-loader port maintaining full feature parity with the original.

examples.title: Compatibility Update
examples.description: Dependency and API surface updates to bring an unmaintained mod back to life.

types.label: Other
types.description: Have something in mind that doesn't fit neatly into a category? Reach out anyway — whether it's a technical consultation, a tool for your workflow, or anything else Minecraft-adjacent, I'm happy to discuss what's possible.

examples.title: Technical Consultation
examples.description: Architecture review and recommendations for a complex modpack or server setup.

examples.title: Build Tool / Script
examples.description: Custom CI pipeline or tooling script for a mod development team.

examples.title: Something Else Entirely
examples.description: If it's Minecraft-adjacent and needs code, let's talk.
